# Strata Storage

> Zero-dependency universal storage library and Capacitor plugin. One unified
> async/sync API across web, Android, and iOS for localStorage, IndexedDB,
> cookies, Cache API, SQLite, Preferences, and Keychain/Keystore — with built-in
> encryption (AES-GCM/CBC), compression, TTL expiration, a MongoDB-style query
> engine, cross-tab sync, integrity checksums, and disaster recovery. Optional
> React, Vue, and Angular bindings. MIT. Developed with love by the Strata
> Storage Team (maintained by Ahsan Mahmood).

Version: 2.8.0 (Node >= 24.13).
Install: `npm install strata-storage` (or `yarn add strata-storage`).
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/strata-storage
Docs: https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com
Website: https://stratastorage.aoneahsan.com
For AI agents: https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/ai
Full text (one file for ingestion): https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/llms-full.txt
Developer: https://aoneahsan.com · Contact: aoneahsan@gmail.com

## Getting started

- [Introduction](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/): what Strata Storage is and why it exists.
- [Installation](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/installation): install for web, React, Vue, Angular, and Capacitor.
- [Quick Start](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/quick-start): first get/set/remove in five minutes.
- [Configuration](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/configuration): adapters, defaults, encryption, compression, TTL, namespacing.

## Guides

- [Encryption](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/features/encryption): AES-GCM/CBC at rest.
- [Compression](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/features/compression): transparent value compression.
- [TTL](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/features/ttl): expiring keys and sliding windows.
- [Querying](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/features/queries): MongoDB-style queries over stored values.
- [Sync](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/features/sync): cross-tab and cross-device synchronization.
- [Migrations](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/features/migrations): versioned data migrations.
- [Capacitor](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/platforms/capacitor): native iOS/Android setup.
- [Firebase](https://stratastorage-docs.aoneahsan.com/guides/platforms/firebase): cross-device Firestore / Realtime DB sync (optional peer dep).

## Adapters

- Web: localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, Cookie, Cache API, Memory, URL.
- Capacitor (native): Preferences, SQLite, Secure (Keychain/Keystore), Filesystem.
- Remote (opt-in): Firebase Firestore and Realtime Database via `enableFirebaseSync`.
